title: Start the Music!
description: Are you ever bored strip mining deep underground and wish you could tell Minecraft to just start the peaceful music already? Now you can!
body:
A Fabric mod that sets the cooldown until the next music track to 0. The default keybind is "g".

<key> = play track

<crouch> + <key> = stop track

Are you ever bored strip mining deep underground and wish you could tell Minecraft to just start the peaceful music already? Now you can!
